com.saxonica.ee.jaxp

Class SchemaFactoryImpl.ErrorListenerWrappingErrorHandler

  • java.lang.Object
    • com.saxonica.ee.jaxp.SchemaFactoryImpl.ErrorListenerWrappingErrorHandler
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    javax.xml.transform.ErrorListener
    Enclosing class:
    SchemaFactoryImpl

    public static class SchemaFactoryImpl.ErrorListenerWrappingErrorHandler
extends java.lang.Object
implements javax.xml.transform.ErrorListener
    A JAXP ErrorListener that wraps a SAX ErrorHandler

    • Constructor Summary

      Constructors 
      Constructor and Description
      SchemaFactoryImpl.ErrorListenerWrappingErrorHandler(org.xml.sax.ErrorHandler handler)
      Create an ErrorListener that wraps a supplied SAX ErrorHandler

      Receive notification of a non-recoverable error.

      Get the wrapped SAX ErrorHandler

      Receive notification of a warning.

      • SchemaFactoryImpl.ErrorListenerWrappingErrorHandler

        public SchemaFactoryImpl.ErrorListenerWrappingErrorHandler(org.xml.sax.ErrorHandler handler)
        Create an ErrorListener that wraps a supplied SAX ErrorHandler
        Parameters:
        handler - the SAX error handler to be wrapped
